mapper.sql: id, name, domain, industry, template_id, logo_url, favicon_url, description, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, site_config::text as site_config, storage_config_id, default_locale, supported_locales::text as supported_locales, i18n_mode, deploy_status, cf_pages_project, cf_deploy_url, matrix_group_id, creator_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_sites WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT FROM ai_sites WHERE domain = #{domain} AND del_flag = '0' AND status = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_sites ( name, domain, industry, template_id, logo_url, favicon_url, description, seo_title, seo_keywords, seo_description, site_config, storage_config_id, default_locale, supported_locales, i18n_mode, deploy_status, matrix_group_id, creator_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{domain}, #{industry}, #{templateId}, #{logoUrl}, #{faviconUrl}, #{description}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoKeywords}, #{seoDescription}, #{siteConfig}::jsonb, #{storageConfigId}, #{defaultLocale}, #{supportedLocales}::jsonb, #{i18nMode}, #{deployStatus}, #{matrixGroupId}, #{creatorId}, #{deptId}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_sites SET del_flag = '1', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
